Title: Confiscate Contraband
Description:
Crusader Security has learned that an illegal production facility at ~mission(Location|Address) is currently being used to manufacture contraband. 

We are seeking a contractor to secure the site, confiscate any contraband, and deliver it to us at ~mission(Destination|Address). The administrative commodity terminal will allow you to submit the contraband into our evidence hold and collect your payment.

Now, this is an automated facility so it’s not clear how long they’ll be manufacturing for, or even how many people may be on site. To be safe, I would go in expecting to meet heavy resistance.

Your total compensation will be based on how packages are safely delivered into evidence.

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Liaison Officer Vanzant
ID# 712L921P
